title: Unnamed CC Resource Pack
description: Bringing ComputerCraft's textures up to modern standards
body:
# Unnamed CC Resource Pack

Want to play around with ComputerCraft but don't like how the textures look? Me too! That's why i made this resource pack that will change all of the item / block textures to match the standards of modern vanilla textures.

**Note:** This project is still work in progress, most textures aren't finished and some are due for a rework.
